data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for verification status at the request-item level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Required verification status at request-item level', but the evidence provided does not include any records or details regarding verification rows with verifier biz/provider metadata. The prior step evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga, failing to address the specific need for verification metadata, which is crucial for confirming the requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of verification rows with verifier biz/provider metadata.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
